params._proposalId: ID of the proposal to cancel
ID of the proposal to vote on
params._support: Whether to support the proposal (true) or vote against (false)

params._proposalId: ID of the proposal to execute

params._user: Address to check voting power for

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params._networkName: Name of the network to add

params._networkId: ID of the network to remove

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

castVote(uint256,bool).notice: Cast a vote on a proposal

getVote(uint256,address).notice: Get vote details for a user on a specific proposal

getVotingPower(address).notice: Get voting power of an address based on unclaimed rewards

proposeAddNetwork(string,string).notice: Create a proposal to add a new network

proposeRemoveNetwork(uint8,string).notice: Create a proposal to remove a network
